3516	/**
3517	 * Helper function to get applicable model, tokenizer, or processor classes for a given model.
3518	 * @param {Map<string, any>} mapping The mapping of names to classes, arrays of classes, or null.
3519	 * @param {string} model The name of the model to load.
3520	 * @param {import('./utils/hub.js').PretrainedOptions} pretrainedOptions The options to pass to the `from_pretrained` method.
3521	 * @private
3522	 */
3523	async function loadItems(mapping, model, pretrainedOptions) {
3524	
3525	    const result = Object.create(null);
3526	
3527	    /**@type {Promise[]} */
3528	    const promises = [];
3529	    for (const [name, cls] of mapping.entries()) {
3530	        if (!cls) continue;
3531	
3532	        /**@type {Promise} */
3533	        let promise;
3534	        if (Array.isArray(cls)) {
3535	            promise = new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => {
3536	                let e;
3537	                for (const c of cls) {
3538	                    if (c === null) {
3539	                        // If null, we resolve it immediately, meaning the relevant
3540	                        // class was not found, but it is optional.
3541	                        resolve(null);
3542	                        return;
3543	                    }
3544	                    try {
3545	                        resolve(await c.from_pretrained(model, pretrainedOptions));
3546	                        return;
3547	                    } catch (err) {
3548	                        if (err.message?.includes('Unsupported model type')) {
3549	                            // If the error is due to an unsupported model type, we
3550	                            // save the error and try the next class.
3551	                            e = err;
3552	                        } else if (err.message?.includes('Could not locate file')) {
3553	                            e = err;
3554	                        } else {
3555	                            reject(err);
3556	                            return;
3557	                        }
3558	
3559	                    }
3560	                }
3561	                reject(e);
3562	            })
3563	        } else {
3564	            promise = cls.from_pretrained(model, pretrainedOptions);
3565	        }
3566	
3567	        result[name] = promise;
3568	        promises.push(promise);
3569	    }
3570	
3571	    // Wait for all promises to resolve (in parallel)
3572	    await Promise.all(promises);
3573	
3574	    // Then assign to result
3575	    for (const [name, promise] of Object.entries(result)) {
3576	        result[name] = await promise;
3577	    }
3578	
3579	    return result;
3580	}

## Plan Summary

Only **one file** needs to change: `src/pipelines.js`, in four precise locations.

---

### What the exploration found

- `AutoModelForImageTextToText` **already exists** in `src/models.js` (line 8736) and maps to Florence2, LLaVA, Qwen2-VL, PaliGemma, SmolVLM, and 6 other architectures — it just isn't imported in `pipelines.js` yet.

- `prepareImages()` utility already handles all `ImageInput` normalization.
- No "image-text-to-text" pipeline or `SUPPORTED_TASKS` entry exists yet.

---

### The 4 changes

| # | Location in `pipelines.js` | What |
|---|---|---|
| **1** | Line 41 (import block) | Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` to the `./models.js` import |
| **2** | After line 2005 (after `ImageToTextPipeline`) | Insert typedefs + `export class ImageTextToTextPipeline` |
| **3** | After line 3255 (after `"image-to-text"` in `SUPPORTED_TASKS`) | Register `"image-text-to-text"` task entry |
| **4** | Line 3427 (factory JSDoc list) | Add `` `"image-text-to-text"` `` bullet |

---

### The `_call` logic

```js
async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {
    const preparedImages = await prepareImages(image);
    const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);      // image → pixel_values

    const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(text, { padding: true, truncation: true });

    const output = await this.model.generate({
        inputs: text_inputs.input_ids,   // text is primary input sequence
        pixel_values,                     // image features merged internally by model
        attention_mask: text_inputs.attention_mask,
        ...generate_kwargs,
    });

    return this.tokenizer.batch_decode(output, { skip_special_tokens: true })
                         .map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));
}
```

Returns a flat `[{ generated_text }]` array (no batch branching, like `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline`). Default model: `"onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft"`.
